characters.name: 39th Street Bridge Gang
characters.description: 39th Street Bridge GangGeneral InformationStatusUnknownDetailsVoice ActorDee Bradley Baker(leader)Mikey Kelley(second member)First AppearanceKevin 11 The39th Street Bridge Gangis a group of four boys who hang out under the 39th Street Bridge inNew York City. The Gang Leader is a bald and muscular teen and wears a brown T-shirt with torn sleeves, a red and white sleeveless vest, blue pants and brown shoes. He also wears a pair of welding goggles and rings on his bottom lip and a wristband on his left wrist. The gang is hostile and have a complete hatred ofKevin Levinafter he trashed their hideout.
characters.personality_section: The gang is hostile and have a complete hatred ofKevin Levinafter he trashed their hideout.

characters.name: 8-Ball Mascot
characters.description: 8-Ball MascotGeneral InformationSpeciesHumanHome WorldEarthResidenceMascotStatusAliveDetailsFirst AppearanceMayhem in MascotGallery 8-Ball Mascotis a character who appeared inMayhem in Mascot. The mascot is a man with a 8 ball on his head and he wears a fancy suit, along with fancy shoes, tie and a cane.

characters.name: Abel North
characters.description: Abel NorthGeneral InformationSpeciesHumanHome WorldEarthStatusAliveOccupationsActorAliasesKangaroo CommandoRelationshipsRelativesKane North(twin brother)DetailsVoice ActorJohn CyganFirst AppearanceSuper Alien Hero Buddy AdventuresGallery Abel Northis a TV actor with a show calledKangaroo Commando, who plays the titular character. Abel has the appearance of a slightly tubby middle-aged man. He has black hair and eyebrows, blue eyes, and a somewhat big chin. He wears a light-brown shirt, dull white undershirt, blue jeans and brown shoes. Abel was mad at Ben (as Heatblast) for ruining his stunt show. When Heatblast tried to explain to Abel that it was an accident, he doused him with a fire extinguisher and asked him if Tim Dean put him up to it. He also explained that it was bad enough Tim knock out Abel's show forSuper Alien Hero Buddies, but then he had to ruin his live shows. After Ben (as Four Arms) saved Abel and a civilian from a falling part of a roller coaster, he began to look jealous. After Abel saved Ben from Cain and he told him that he guesses they could get the job done without their costumes, he was happy to reconcile with Tim Dean.

characters.name: Accidentals
characters.description: AccidentalsGeneral InformationCreatorDr. AnimoAlliesBen TennysonObjectivesTo escapeDr. Animo's FarmDetailsFirst AppearanceAnimo Farm TheAccidentalsare a group of mutant failures created byDr. Animo. He uses them for work on the farm. They later escaped and defeated theAlphas. Dr. Animo made the Accidentals, but they didn't turn out as the kind of mutants he wanted, so he used them to do work on the farm. One day,MadcowandBoxermistookStinkflyas an Accidental, so they put him on the farm with the real Accidentals.Ben Tennysoncouldn't change back to his human self because the Farm kept him in his current alien form. As Stinkfly, Ben convinced the Accidentals to use teamwork and break out of the Farm, so as a team, the Accidentals and Stinkfly defeated the Alphas and escaped the Farm. Later, the Accidentals played football with Ben and their team won against the other team.

characters.name: Accidentals

Dr. Animo made the Accidentals, but they didn't turn out as the kind of mutants he wanted, so he used them to do work on the farm. One day,MadcowandBoxermistookStinkflyas an Accidental, so they put him on the farm with the real Accidentals.Ben Tennysoncouldn't change back to his human self because the Farm kept him in his current alien form. As Stinkfly, Ben convinced the Accidentals to use teamwork and break out of the Farm, so as a team, the Accidentals and Stinkfly defeated the Alphas and escaped the Farm. Later, the Accidentals played football with Ben and their team won against the other team.

characters.name: Acid Breath
characters.description: Acid BreathOVOSGeneral InformationSpeciesMutant Human[DR 1]Home WorldEarthStatusImprisonedAffiliationsCircus Freak TrioZombozo(formerly)Zombozo's Traveling Circus of Laughs(formerly)Zs'Skayr(formerly)Negative 10(formerly)OccupationsCircus PerformerThiefNicknamesStink Breath(Gwen Tennyson)[2]Mr. Breath(Sir Driscoll)[3]Acid(Sir Driscoll)[3]Ghoul Face(Rojo)[4]Powers and AbilitiesAbilitiesAcid BreathAcid SpitAcid IgnitionAcid ImmunityEnhanced AgilityRelationshipsRelativesUnnamed mother[1]DetailsVoice ActorDee Bradley BakerFirst AppearanceLast LaughGallery – TheBarkerintroducing Acid Breath.[1] Acid Breathis one ofZombozo'sthree minions, and without a higher rank to command them, he acts as the trio's leader. Acid Breath is a somewhat sadistic criminal who doesn't mind hurting others to get what he wants. Although he usually leads theCircus Freak Triowhen they are not being led by another individual, Acid Breath usually has a more leadership role among the three members of the group. He can also be coerced into taking orders from someone more powerful than him, such asZs'Skayrfor example.

characters.name: Acid Breath
characters.description: Acid BreathGeneral InformationSpeciesMutantHuman[1][DR 1]Home WorldEarthAge16[1]StatusAliveAffiliationsCircus Freak Trio[Classic Info]ZombozoOccupationsCircus PerformerThiefNicknamesStink Breath(Frightwig)Powers and AbilitiesAbilitiesAcid BreathAcid SpitAcid ImmunityEnhanced DurabilityEnhanced AgilityEnhanced JumpingDetailsVoice ActorJosh KeatonFirst AppearanceZombozo-LandGallery Acid Breathis one ofZombozo'sthree minions, and without a higher rank to command them, he acts as the trio's leader. Acid Breath has pale skin. He has red eyes with different-sized pupils, and two stands of black hair. Most of his teeth are missing. Acid Breath is somewhat bossy towards his fellow henchmen, mostly because of his seniority working underZombozo. Despite being the leader of the Circus Freak Trio, Acid Breath dislikes being called a freak.[2]He almost always speaks in a whiny tone.

characters.name: Addwaitya
characters.description: AddwaityaOVUAGeneral InformationSpeciesAlteredGeochelone Aerios[DM 1]Home WorldAldabraResidenceAddwaitya's Citadel,Legerdomain(destroyed)LegerdomainAgeThousands of years[DM 2]StatusAliveAffiliationsAddwaitya's Pallorfang(pet; deceased)OccupationsRevered Philosopher(formerly)Ruler of Legerdomain(formerly)Master MagicianNicknamesOld Windbag(Charmcaster)[1]Powers and AbilitiesAbilitiesMagicMannaManipulationSpell CastingAstral ProjectionControl of some species in LegerdomainOptic BlastsCrystallizationForce Field GenerationTeleportationAerokinesisEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityFlightFan Blade FormationAerokinetic BlastsAerokinetic RedirectionAerokinetic SuctionAir Absorption(via Aerokinetic Suction)Tornado GenerationSharp Fan Blades<LevitationEnhanced Speed(via Flight)Poisonous Gas ImmunityMannaResistanceRetractable ClawsRetractable HeadRetractable LimbsEquipmentAlpha Rune(formerly)DetailsVoice ActorJohn DiMaggio(Ultimate Alien)Steve Blum(Omniverse)First AppearanceWhere the Magic HappensGallery MagicMannaManipulationSpell CastingAstral ProjectionControl of some species in LegerdomainOptic BlastsCrystallizationForce Field GenerationTeleportationAerokinesisEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityFlightFan Blade FormationAerokinetic BlastsAerokinetic RedirectionAerokinetic SuctionAir Absorption(via Aerokinetic Suction)Tornado GenerationSharp Fan Blades<LevitationEnhanced Speed(via Flight)Poisonous Gas ImmunityMannaResistanceRetractable ClawsRetractable HeadRetractable Limbs – Addwaitya toCharmcaster.[2] Once Addwaitya got his hands on the Alpha Rune, its power corrupted him to the point to where he believed all things living "steals" manna from him. Once the Alpha Rune and his throne were taken from him, his sanity appeared to have been slightly damaged, although that didn't stop him from his attempts to retrieve the Alpha Rune as well as his throne from their new owner: Charmcaster. As ofOmniverse, he is bitter from his past defeats, even more so at how helpless he is in Charmcaster's bag, but during the time he spent in there he proved to be very manipulative, as he gave advice to Charmcaster that seemed helpful, but would ultimately fail, leading to his eventual escape from her bag.

characters.name: Addwaitya's Pallorfang
characters.description: Addwaitya's PallorfangGeneral InformationSpeciesPallorfangHome WorldLegerdomainResidenceAddwaitya's Citadel,LegerdomainStatusDeceasedOccupationsGuardPowers and AbilitiesAbilitiesManna BlastsFire BreathingStrong TeethEnhanced StrengthRelationshipsRelativesAddwaitya(owner)DetailsVoice ActorDee Bradley BakerFirst AppearanceWhere the Magic HappensGallery Addwaitya's Pallorfangwashispet and served as a guard forhis citadel. Addwaitya's Pallorfang was a green bipedal dinosaur-like creature with small pupil-less purple eyes, black lips, large teeth and black claws: four on its hands and two on its feet. It had stone-like skin and bony spikes of the same material as its teeth, two of which protruded from its jaw and ten of which ran from their head down their back.

characters.name: Adolfo
characters.description: AdolfoGeneral InformationSpeciesHumanHome WorldEarthResidenceRio de JaneiroStatusAliveAffiliationsGaranGwen TennysonDetailsVoice ActorHenrique JardimFirst AppearanceThe Claws of the Cat Adolfois a character who appeared inThe Claws of the Cat. He practices the Capoeira martial art. Adolfo is a Brazilian man with black braided hair, some of which is tied back, and some facial hair. He wears a white pair of pants, with a black cord acting as a belt. Adolfo is very welcoming, being willing to teachGwenCapoeira at her request.

Some of them are armed with laser rifles. The others are unarmed. The Aggrebots first appeared inEscape From Aggregor, where they were seen throughoutAggregor'sstarship.

characters.name: Aggregor
characters.description: AggregorGeneral InformationSpeciesArtificial MutantHuman(Osmosian)[DJW 1]Alternate FormsAggregor's Geochelone Aerios MutationUltimate AggregorHome WorldNull Void[DJW 1]Osmos V(retconned)[note 1]ResidenceAggregor's Starship(formerly)Null VoidAge5 or less(chronologically)Unknown(biologically)StatusImprisoned[DM 1]AffiliationsRooters(creators)Aggrebots(formerly)OccupationsLab ExperimentWarlordPowers and AbilitiesAbilitiesEnergy AbsorptionDNA Absorption(via Energy Absorption)Power Absorption(via DNA Absorption)MannaAbsorption(via Energy Absorption)Matter AbsorptionSpearmanshipEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityEngineering ExpertiseStrategy ExpertiseEquipmentShock Staff(formerly)Starship(destroyed)Power Suppressor(formerly)Tracking Device(formerly)Energy Cuffs(formerly)Force Field Device(formerly)Ship Control Device(formerly)Mind Control Headbands(formerly)Map of Infinity(formerly)Alpha Rune(formerly)RelationshipsRelativesKevin Levin(DNA source)[note 2]Servantis(creator)[DJW 1]DetailsVoice ActorJohn DiMaggioFirst AppearanceFameGallery Energy AbsorptionDNA Absorption(via Energy Absorption)Power Absorption(via DNA Absorption)MannaAbsorption(via Energy Absorption)Matter AbsorptionSpearmanshipEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityEngineering ExpertiseStrategy Expertise – Aggregor to his prisoners.[1] Aggregor is a cruel, patient, sadistic, menacing, and arrogant sociopath, who does whatever it takes to achieve his goals, having no remorse for any of his actions. He has a brilliant mind and is willing to go to extreme lengths  to succeed. Aggregor's abilities make him a daunting and formidable enemy, who can hold his own against even thePlumbers.[2]He fears no one and hungers for power. Unlike most of Ben's other enemies, such asVilgaxand theHighbreed, Aggregor is more "hands-on" when fulfilling his schemes rather than relying on his roboticminionsto do the work, instead using them for lesser duties, such as ship crew, manual labor, security, and distracting his enemies. Additionally, Aggregor's power-hungry desires come from the desire of not letting others control him, hinted by his rebuttal to Kevin's claim of how absorbing energy causesOsmosiansto go insane, calling them "lies told by the powerful to control the weak".[2]This also relates to his goal to possess ultimate power in order to control the entireuniverse.

Additionally, Aggregor's power-hungry desires come from the desire of not letting others control him, hinted by his rebuttal to Kevin's claim of how absorbing energy causesOsmosiansto go insane, calling them "lies told by the powerful to control the weak".[2]This also relates to his goal to possess ultimate power in order to control the entireuniverse.

characters.name: Aggregor
characters.description: AggregorGeneral InformationSpeciesArtificial MutantHuman(Osmosian)[DJW 1]Alternate FormsAggregor's Geochelone Aerios MutationUltimate AggregorHome WorldNull Void[DJW 1]Osmos V(retconned)[note 1]ResidenceAggregor's Starship(formerly)Null VoidAge5 or less(chronologically)Unknown(biologically)StatusImprisoned[DM 1]AffiliationsRooters(creators)Aggrebots(formerly)OccupationsLab ExperimentWarlordPowers and AbilitiesAbilitiesEnergy AbsorptionDNA Absorption(via Energy Absorption)Power Absorption(via DNA Absorption)MannaAbsorption(via Energy Absorption)Matter AbsorptionSpearmanshipEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityEngineering ExpertiseStrategy ExpertiseEquipmentShock Staff(formerly)Starship(destroyed)Power Suppressor(formerly)Tracking Device(formerly)Energy Cuffs(formerly)Force Field Device(formerly)Ship Control Device(formerly)Mind Control Headbands(formerly)Map of Infinity(formerly)Alpha Rune(formerly)RelationshipsRelativesKevin Levin(DNA source)[note 2]Servantis(creator)[DJW 1]DetailsVoice ActorJohn DiMaggioFirst AppearanceFameGallery Energy AbsorptionDNA Absorption(via Energy Absorption)Power Absorption(via DNA Absorption)MannaAbsorption(via Energy Absorption)Matter AbsorptionSpearmanshipEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityEngineering ExpertiseStrategy Expertise – Aggregor to his prisoners.[1] Aggregor is a cruel, patient, sadistic, menacing, and arrogant sociopath, who does whatever it takes to achieve his goals, having no remorse for any of his actions. He has a brilliant mind and is willing to go to extreme lengths  to succeed. Aggregor's abilities make him a daunting and formidable enemy, who can hold his own against even thePlumbers.[2]He fears no one and hungers for power. Unlike most of Ben's other enemies, such asVilgaxand theHighbreed, Aggregor is more "hands-on" when fulfilling his schemes rather than relying on his roboticminionsto do the work, instead using them for lesser duties, such as ship crew, manual labor, security, and distracting his enemies. Additionally, Aggregor's power-hungry desires come from the desire of not letting others control him, hinted by his rebuttal to Kevin's claim of how absorbing energy causesOsmosiansto go insane, calling them "lies told by the powerful to control the weak".[2]This also relates to his goal to possess ultimate power in order to control the entireuniverse.

He has a brilliant mind and is willing to go to extreme lengths  to succeed. Aggregor's abilities make him a daunting and formidable enemy, who can hold his own against even thePlumbers.[2]He fears no one and hungers for power. Unlike most of Ben's other enemies, such asVilgaxand theHighbreed, Aggregor is more "hands-on" when fulfilling his schemes rather than relying on his roboticminionsto do the work, instead using them for lesser duties, such as ship crew, manual labor, security, and distracting his enemies. Additionally, Aggregor's power-hungry desires come from the desire of not letting others control him, hinted by his rebuttal to Kevin's claim of how absorbing energy causesOsmosiansto go insane, calling them "lies told by the powerful to control the weak".[2]This also relates to his goal to possess ultimate power in order to control the entireuniverse.

characters.name: Arch-King Agillies Torondon Maguro
characters.description: Agillies Torondon MaguroGeneral InformationSpeciesIckthyperambuloidHome WorldGilli-Perambulous PromenadeStatusAliveOccupationsKingAliasesKing Gilli[DJW 1]Powers and AbilitiesAbilitiesSlippery BodyEnhanced AgilityEnhanced AcrobaticsEnhanced DurabilityStrong TailUnderwater BreathingCorrupturaImmunity Arch-King Agillies Torondon Maguro, affectionately publicly referred to asKing Gilli,[DJW 1]is theIckthyperambuloids' constitutional monarch. He is a character concept created byDerrick J. Wyattafter the show ended. King Gilli is a mere figurehead of a waning monarchy[DJW 2]and walks pretty briskly.[DJW 3] King Gilli is a mere figurehead of a waning monarchy[DJW 2]and walks pretty briskly.[DJW 3]

characters.name: Agni
characters.description: AgniGeneral InformationSpeciesPyroniteHome WorldPyrosOccupationsBounty HunterDetailsFirst AppearanceFinal Clash Agniis aPyronitewho appears in the online gameFinal Clash. He is one of the four original characters that was made for the game alongsideGokstad,WarchitandKruos. Agni's appearance is identical toHeatblastinOmniverse, except he is darker, lacks theOmnitrixsymbol and his flames are orange.

characters.name: Air Force Major General
characters.description: Air Force Major GeneralGeneral InformationSpeciesHumanHome WorldEarthStatusAlive(as of 1962/1963)AffiliationsUnited States Air ForceNellis Air Force BaseOccupationsAir Force Major GeneralDetailsVoice ActorJeff BennettFirst AppearanceMoonstruckGallery TheAir Force Major General[credits 1][1]wasMax's boss during his time at the Air Force. The Major General was an elderly, semi-bald man with grey hair and mustache. He wore a blue military uniform, alongside a blue cap, and black shoes.

characters.name: Alan Albright
characters.actor_name: Zeno Robinson(Alien Force and Ultimate Alien)Bumper Robinson(Omniverse)
characters.description: Alan AlbrightOVUAFGeneral InformationSpeciesHuman/PyroniteHybridHuman(formerly)Home WorldEarthResidenceAlan's House,Grover's Mill[1]Rooter Headquarters,Null Void(formerly)Plumbers' Academy(formerly)Age8(Omniverse Flashbacks)12(Alien Force)[note 1]13(Ultimate Alien and Omniverse)StatusAliveAffiliationsMax TennysonPlumbersBen's TeamAmalgam Kids(disbanded)Alien Force(semi-active)Plumbers' Helpers(disbanded)Plumbers' Academy(formerly)OccupationsPlumberAliasesHeatblast[2][script 1][DM 2]Heatblast II[script 2]NicknamesHeatblast Jr.(Kevin Levin)[1]Powers and AbilitiesAbilitiesPyronite TransformationPyrokinesisFire/Heat AmplificationPyrokinetic FlightTerrakinesisEnhanced AcrobaticsEnhanced Speed(via Pyrokinetic Flight)Enhanced ReflexesIce/Cold ResistanceHeat RadiationFire SpitGunmanshipEquipmentPlumber BadgeDNA Repair Gun(formerly)Rooter Helmet(formerly)RelationshipsRelativesMr. Albright(father)Mrs. Albright(mother)Unnamed younger sibling(s)[1]Unnamed Pyronite(genetic donor)DetailsVoice ActorZeno Robinson(Alien Force and Ultimate Alien)Bumper Robinson(Omniverse)First AppearanceEverybody Talks About the WeatherGallery Pyronite TransformationPyrokinesisFire/Heat AmplificationPyrokinetic FlightTerrakinesisEnhanced AcrobaticsEnhanced Speed(via Pyrokinetic Flight)Enhanced ReflexesIce/Cold ResistanceHeat RadiationFire SpitGunmanship – Alan.[1] Alan is a very mature, easygoing, and brave young boy. UnlikeBenwhen he was young, Alan has never tried to use his powers for his own gain. Alan is not afraid to do whatever he can to defend himself, seen when he was arrested by the police and did not hesitate to attack them as he was desperate to prove his innocence.[1] Alan does not seem to be very forgiving, as when he met up withKevinagain after draining hisPyronitepowers the last time they met, he refused to accept Kevin's apology or listen to him and insisted that he leave his presence. Alan finally forgave Kevin after he protected him fromSwiftand was willing to listen to what he needed to explain.[3]

characters.name: Albedo
characters.actor_name: Yuri Lowenthal(15 and 16 years old and Galvan; Ultimate Alien)Eric Bauza(Galvan; Omniverse)Tara Strong(11 years old)
characters.description: AlbedoOV3OV2OV1AF3/UAAF2AF1General InformationSpeciesHuman[note 1](Altered)[1]Human(formerly)Galvan(formerly; temporarily)Alternate FormsUltimate AlbedoHome WorldGalvan PrimeResidenceEarth(formerly)AgeHundreds of years[DM 1]Human Form:15(Alien Force)16(Ultimate AlienandOmniverse; formerly)11(currently)StatusImprisonedAffiliationsAzmuth(formerly)Vilgax(formerly)Ben 10 Live(ended)Khyber(formerly)OccupationsAzmuth's Assistant(formerly)Actor(formerly)AliasesNegative Ben[credits 1][2][credits 2][3]The Ultimate Thinker[4]NicknamesFeckless Facsimile(Ben Tennyson)[5]Powers and AbilitiesAbilitiesEnhanced IntelligenceDNA AlterationTechnological ExpertiseTechnology CreationSkilled Hand-to-Hand CombatantEnhanced ReflexesEquipmentOmnitrix(formerly)Original Ultimatrix(formerly)Ultimatrix(formerly)RelationshipsRelativesBen Tennyson(HumanDNA)CounterpartsAlternateAlbedo(Negative Alien XTimeline)[6][7]Albedo(Original Future Timeline)[DJW 1]DetailsVoice ActorYuri Lowenthal(15 and 16 years old and Galvan; Ultimate Alien)Eric Bauza(Galvan; Omniverse)Tara Strong(11 years old)First AppearanceGood Copy, Bad CopyGallery – Albedo, while in prison.[5] Albedo[note 2]also known asNegative Ben,[credits 1][2][credits 2][3]isAzmuth's former assistant, who, in his attempt to recreate theOmnitrix, turned himself into an imperfect clone ofBen Tennyson. Since then, he has been trying to get back to hisGalvanform, while also harboring a great hatred and thirst for revenge for Ben Tennyson and Azmuth. Before he turned against Azmuth, Albedo was an eccentric genius who demonstrated quite an amount of respect toward Azmuth, and he showed concern for the safety of others. At the same time, however, he still displays an arrogant sense of superiority toward others in some aspects—mostly intelligence.[9] In the present day, Albedo is arrogant, self-centered, ambitious, and bitter. He is also uncapable to acceptBen's right to being the wielder of theOmnitrix, thinking that he is just an unworthy human.[5]Originally being a scientist, he speaks with a larger vocabulary, being more intellectual than Ben, though in a rather cold and condescending manner. He also refuses to take blame for his actions as shown when he blamed Ben for his form turning negative despite it being his fault that the pulse that turned his form negative was emitted. Because he had gained Ben's DNA, Albedo acquired Ben's cravings and habits, which he considers utterly repulsive: he has the same taste in food, scratches himself in "suspected" inappropriate places, and his left eye twitches whenever he lies. As a running gag of the series, he develops an insatiable craving forchili fries, even more than Ben himself, calling it a "human weakness." Originally, he had hated this habit, but develops a liking for them, though he denies this and blames it on his human DNA. Albedo is suspicious and distrustful of others. During his brief team up withVilgax, he had his suspicions of Vilgax betraying him from the very beginning, wh

characters.name: Alien Contractors
characters.description: Alien ContractorsGeneral InformationSpeciesUnknownResidenceBellwoodOccupationsPainterRepairmanPowers and AbilitiesEquipmentVarious Weapons and EquipmentSolar Vacuum CleanerDetailsFirst AppearanceTim 10 TheAlien Contractorsare a pair of aliens who works atUndertownPainting & Home Repair. The Alien Contractors are a pair of nearly identical aliens with green, scaly skins. They both have three blunt horns on their head and bulging eyes. Both of them wear blue suspenders, with one of them not wearing his strap properly and have some hair on his chin while the other wears a backwards hat. They both have a tail, four fingers, three toes and dull colored nails. The two of them are licensed contractors who occasionally pilfer goods of customers they think crossed their paths. Originally, they refused to pay for goods such as pizza, and even threaten to attackTimothyin order to get it for free. However, after being temporarily arrested by thePlumbers, they learned their lesson and paid for their goods from then on, crossing paths with Timothy again, who delivered them pizza in their shop in Undertown. They both seem to like pizza.
